# Stock picking lines with sequence number

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:209dcf5490c46d29e7e936206ac528110e0e3a8c4875e034770fac5f6cdcf2a7
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

Provide a new field sequence on stock moves, which allows to manage the order of moves in a picking.

For further information, please visit:

- <https://www.odoo.com/forum/help-1>

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Bug Tracker

Bugs are tracked on [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/OCA/stock-logistics-workflow/issues).
In case of trouble, please check there if your issue has already been reported.
If you spotted it first, help us to smash it by providing a detailed and welcomed
[feedback](https://github.com/OCA/stock-logistics-workflow/issues/new?body=module:%20stock_picking_line_sequence%0Aversion:%2016.0%0A%0A**Steps%20to%20reproduce**%0A-%20...%0A%0A**Current%20behavior**%0A%0A**Expected%20behavior**).

methods.name: odoo.addons.stock_picking_line_sequence.models.stock.StockPicking._compute_max_line_sequence
documentation:
Allow to know the highest sequence entered in move lines.
Then we add 1 to this value for the next sequence, this value is
passed to the context of the o2m field in the view.
So when we create new move line, the sequence is automatically
incremented by 1. (max_sequence + 1)
